headline: AON Delivers 10% Dividend Increase on Solid Financial Footing
summary: AON lifts its quarterly dividend 10% to 82 cents, extending a run of steady payout growth backed by strong cash flow and ongoing share repurchases.

headline: A Look At Aon (AON) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Aon stock snapshot after recent performance Aon (AON) has been under pressure recently, with the share price seeing a 3.9% decline over the past week and a 9.3% decline over the past 3 months, bringing the latest close to US$312.57. See our latest analysis for Aon. Beyond the latest weekly drop, momentum has been fading for some time, with a 90 day share price return of 9.3% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 18.0%. headline: Aon’s 10% Dividend Hike Highlights Cash Returns And Valuation Gap
summary: Aon (NYSE:AON) announced a 10% increase in its quarterly cash dividend. The higher dividend was approved by the board, signaling confidence in the company’s financial position. The move reflects Aon’s focus on returning cash to shareholders through its regular dividend program. Aon operates as a global provider of risk, retirement, and health solutions, serving corporates and institutions that rely on its advisory and brokerage services. For investors tracking insurance brokers and risk...
